title: Its genuinely weird seeing people mainly on YouTube and Tiktok shipping Shinji and Misato
display_title: Its genuinely weird seeing people mainly on YouTube and Tiktok shipping Shinji and Misato
wikitext:
[]: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by metropolite » Sat Nov 02, 2024 7:23 pm Hihi!! My first post on here. I haven't watched Evangelion in years, I hope this is as accurate as can be. So, it's weird to me how people constantly talk about how Shinji somehow "needed" a relationship with Misato, when in reality, both of them we're at their lowest. Shinji, basically dealing with the loss of his mother and wanting motherly love and fighting in a huge robot, and Misato not being able to view love as anything other than sex. What's also odd is that people treat their "relationship" as if it's regular and not a 36-43 year old Misato trying to get with a 14 year old Shinji. I think (some) Evangelion fans have to see through their stepmother kink and realize that "relationships" like these are not okay, real life or anime regardless. But that's just my thoughts.

[]: Re: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Nov 02, 2024 9:30 pm To be fair, everyone is at their lowest in Eva. But yes, I think this is a case of people self-inserting and living out a fantasy via projection. However, that's a lot of where the appeal of anime character writing and scenarios come from and the creators are well aware. Shinji & Kaworu are very popular for the same reason. The way Eva leans into its Freudian trappings makes no coincidence of the fetishistic bent of a lot of the character dynamics. But in that way, I think people who come at it with JUST the shipping slant probably aren't going to keep the word "oedipal" in mind and to me it just skews so far away from the intention of the show itself. It's not an aspirational relationship.

[]: Re: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Nov 03, 2024 4:28 am It's almost never serious. I don't think I've ever talked to someone about it and they actually unironically defended it as a ship.

[]: Re: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by LonelyAsuka » Wed Feb 05, 2025 7:40 am metropolite wrote: What's also odd is that people treat their "relationship" as if it's regular and not a 36-43 year old Misato trying to get with a 14 year old Shinji.

[]: Re: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Tue Mar 04, 2025 1:40 am It is mostly self-projecting to live out a fantasy from fans, but it's not like the ship comes entirely out of nowhere. First scene with Shinji, he's holding a picture of Misato with arrows pointing at her breasts. A naked Misato is a part of Shinji's illusions inside Unit 01 and EoE, in conjunction with his attraction to Rei and Asuka, suggesting he felt something even if he was revolted from both of her come ons. On Misato's end, Episode 26 showed there was a part of her- that she's ashamed of to be clear- that wanted Shinji to see her in a sexual way, making him watch her fuck Kaji in college. Misato frequently showed favoritism toward Shinji and thought kissing him would work as a motivator. There is an intended subtext between them in the original and EoE even if it thankfully never comes to pass.

[]: Re: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Mar 04, 2025 11:57 am Misato is only 29, not 36-43, but it's still unseemly.

[]: Re: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by angelofgendo » Wed Apr 02, 2025 2:42 pm It's a lot less weird shipping those two in the latter Rebuild movies.

[]: Re: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by bunnyducthess » Wed Apr 02, 2025 3:13 pm This is not happening. Nobody ships them especially on TikTok where everyone is so strict about being morally righteous with their ships. If you ever do come across one I guarantee it would be filled with hate
summary: []: It's genuinely weird seeing people, mainly on YouTube and Tiktok, shipping Shinji and Misato.             Quote Post by metropolite » Sat Nov 02, 2024 7:23 pm Hihi!! My first post on here. I haven't watched Evangelion in years, I hope this is as accurate as can be. So, it's weird to me how people constantly talk about how Shinji somehow "needed" a relationship with Misato, when in reality, both of them we're at their lowest. S
